title: Totem Pop Chams
description: Captures player entity states on totem pops and displays a ghosted version in it's place
body:
Totem Pop Chams!

This mod captures the visual state of a player when they pop a totem of undying and displays a 'ghosted' version in that place. --- ### **Config** ![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664f2ab6cbdadd0ca508d82219f81deae5092618_0.webp) **Information** _**Disperse Settings**_ ![Disperse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ceeaa0b0243861b073e8181f0d2a7f5f4c9d28.gif) *(Low FPS due to gif)* - These settings make the model fly outwards from the player's pop position, instead of it staying in the same place. - You can control the distance (in blocks) it travels and the speed it travels at. - These settings still factor in the lifetime of the ghost, so you may have to tweak the lifetime if you want a larger coverage. --- **Credits** - Mod: Walksy
